scripts.dev: bun run dev:banner && concurrently -n api,app,admin,landing,print -c blue,magenta,green,yellow,cyan "bun run dev:api" "bun run dev:app" "bun run dev:admin" "bun run dev:landing" "bun run dev:print-agent"
scripts.dev:all: bun run dev:banner && concurrently -n api,app,admin,landing,print -c blue,magenta,green,yellow,cyan "bun run dev:api" "bun run dev:app" "bun run dev:admin" "bun run dev:landing" "bun run dev:print-agent"
scripts.dev:banner: echo '' && echo '╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════╗' && echo '║     🍽️  MenuGest SaaS — Monorepo                    ║' && echo '╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════╝' && echo '' && echo '  📡 Rutas del proyecto:' && echo '' && echo '    API         → http://localhost:3001   (NestJS)' && echo '    API Docs    → http://localhost:3001/docs   (Swagger)' && echo '    App         → http://localhost:3000   (TanStack Start)' && echo '    Admin       → http://localhost:3003   (Panel SUPER_ADMIN)' && echo '    Landing     → http://localhost:4321   (Astro)' && echo '    Print Agent → http://localhost:3002   (ESC/POS)' && echo '    Health      → http://localhost:3002/health' && echo '' && echo '  💡 App multi-tenant: usa http://localhost:3000/{slug}' && echo '     Ejemplo: http://localhost:3000/demo   (slug del negocio)' && echo ''
scripts.dev:app: bun run scripts/wait-for-api.mjs && bun run --filter @saas/app dev
scripts.dev:admin: bun run scripts/wait-for-api.mjs && bun run --filter @saas/admin dev
